lede: Architectural, heavy civil, and electrical, all in-house. One contractor carries the job from foundation to finish.

cards.title: Range no one matches
cards.body: Finish work and blasted rock are different trades. We hold GC credentials and a heavy civil fleet, so complex, mixed-scope projects stay under one contract.

cards.title: Self-performed
cards.body: Blasting, crushing, earthworks, concrete, framing, steel, electrical. Our forces, our equipment. One schedule, one point of accountability, no markup pyramid.

cards.title: Own the aggregate
cards.body: Spec material comes off our own crushers, from our quarries. On remote and rural work, managing the aggregate is the job.

cards.title: Built for this province
cards.body: Two generations building through Newfoundland winters, coastal logistics, and long supply lines, anywhere the work is. Remote isn't a risk factor here - it's the home field.
